array.string: SOYEHT_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Soyeht"; ENGINE_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/engine"; export ADMIN_PORT="8892"; export ADDR="0.0.0.0:8892"; export THEYOS_BIN_DIR="$ENGINE_DIR"; export THEYOS_SQLITE_DB="$SOYEHT_DIR/theyos.db"; export THEYOS_RATELIMIT_DB="$SOYEHT_DIR/ratelimit.db"; export THEYOS_CONVERSATIONS_DIR="$SOYEHT_DIR/conversations"; export THEYOS_SKIP_LEGACY_MIGRATION="1"; export THEYOS_FORCE_SOFTWARE_KEYS="1"; export THEYOS_VMRUNNER_RS_BIN="$ENGINE_DIR/vmrunner_macos_ipc"; export THEYOS_STORE_RS_BIN="$ENGINE_DIR/store-ipc"; export THEYOS_TERMINAL_RS_BIN="$ENGINE_DIR/terminal-ipc"; export THEYOS_SSH_CTL="$ENGINE_DIR/theyos-ssh"; export THEYOS_APNS_KEY_PATH="$SOYEHT_DIR/apns.p8"; export THEYOS_APNS_KEY_ID="5FPYV735V4"; export THEYOS_APNS_TEAM_ID="W7677A5BK2"; export THEYOS_APNS_TOPIC="com.soyeht.app"; exec "$ENGINE_DIR/theyos-engine"
